mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate signals labor market deterioration and impending recession, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real sales of final goods and housing starts indicates broad-based demand expansion, supporting positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects supply-side momentum that translates into positive short-term equity returns during expansion phases.
failure_condition: Signal reverses direction during inflationary shocks despite high INDPRO growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid monthly inflation spikes trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains consumer spending and corporate earnings, generating positive quarterly S&P 500 returns.
Strong quarterly GDP growth combined with rising real sales of final goods confirms robust aggregate demand, driving positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Coefficient on interaction term turns negative in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal supply-side contraction and weakening economic activity, leading to negative quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns in >55% of triggered instances over 10-year backtest.
